rows.plain_language_summary: Surface 'ai_gateway' explainability qualifies stable: the posture inspector shows the effective proxy mode, trust source, and mirror/offline state; the recent event has a typed disposition; and the explain sheet renders at field-catalog parity so product, CLI, and support views match.

Surface 'docs_browser_fetcher' explainability qualifies stable: the posture inspector shows the effective proxy mode, trust source, and mirror/offline state; the recent event has a typed disposition; and the explain sheet renders at field-catalog parity so product, CLI, and support views match.

Surface 'provider_mutation' explainability narrowed to beta (denial_explanation_missing): see defect list for details.

defects.note: decision 'remote:transport_decision:provider_mutation:0001' on surface 'provider_mutation' is denied but its explain sheet carries no typed denial reason

posture_inspectors.summary: Surface 'ai_gateway' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a inference_gateway endpoint with managed_endpoint egress; host proof is anchored by managed_trust_bundle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it local_core_only; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'docs_browser_fetcher' is reachable over the system_proxy route (system_proxy proxy tier) to a content_origin endpoint with public_internet egress; host proof is anchored by system_trust_store (fresh); when the route is unavailable it cached_offline; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'request_api_client' is reachable over the manual_proxy route (manual_proxy proxy tier) to a rest_api endpoint with public_internet egress; host proof is anchored by system_trust_store (fresh); when the route is unavailable it deny_all; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'database_cloud_connector' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a data_store endpoint with public_internet egress; host proof is anchored by pinned_ca_handle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it deny_all; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'registry_read' is reachable over the mirror_first route (mirror_route proxy tier) to a artifact_registry endpoint with mirror_only egress; host proof is anchored by mirror_root_handle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it mirror_first_then_deny; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'companion_handoff' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a peer_device endpoint with loopback_only egress; host proof is anchored by no_tls_loopback (fresh); when the route is unavailable it local_core_only; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'provider_mutation' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a vcs_host endpoint with managed_endpoint egress; host proof is anchored by managed_trust_bundle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it deny_all; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'sync_offboarding' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a sync_service endpoint with managed_endpoint egress; host proof is anchored by managed_trust_bundle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it offline_grace; local editing continues regardless.

Surface 'remote_preview_route' is reachable over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a preview_origin endpoint with managed_endpoint egress; host proof is anchored by managed_trust_bundle (fresh); when the route is unavailable it deny_all; local editing continues regardless.

entries.summary: AI inference request resolved to the managed gateway over a direct route with a bearer-token handle and managed trust bundle; egress allowed; local editing continues without the gateway.
Documentation fetch resolved to a content origin over the system proxy (lowest precedence tier), anonymous, system trust store; egress allowed; cached content stays available offline.

API request resolved to a REST endpoint over a manually-pinned proxy (preferred over the system proxy), API-key handle, system trust store; egress allowed; denies all when offline; local work continues.
Data-store connection resolved over a direct route with a client-certificate handle anchored to a pinned CA; egress allowed; denies all when offline; local work continues.
Registry read resolved to the signed mirror and was served from it; the route denies rather than falling through to the public internet; installed items continue without registry access.
Companion handoff resolved over a loopback-only direct route with a session-cookie handle on the on-device trust boundary; egress allowed; the desktop continues without the companion.

Provider mutation resolved to the managed VCS host over a direct route with a delegated-OAuth handle; egress allowed inline; the non-idempotent mutation is never queued for offline replay; denies all when offline.
Sync action resolved to the managed sync service but the route was offline; the idempotent action was deferred for replay within the offline-grace window; local data is retained.

Remote preview route resolved to the first-party preview origin over a direct route with a bearer-token handle and managed trust bundle; egress allowed; denies all when offline; the local workspace continues without the preview.

explain_sheets.route_explanation: Action 'remote:transport_decision:ai_gateway:0001' on surface 'ai_gateway' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: managed_endpoint egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a inference_gateway endpoint, presenting a bearer_token_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by managed_trust_bundle.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:docs_browser_fetcher:0001' on surface 'docs_browser_fetcher' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: public_internet egress over the system_proxy route (system_proxy proxy tier) to a content_origin endpoint, presenting a anonymous credential handle, with host proof anchored by system_trust_store.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:request_api_client:0001' on surface 'request_api_client' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: public_internet egress over the manual_proxy route (manual_proxy proxy tier) to a rest_api endpoint, presenting a api_key_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by system_trust_store.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:database_cloud_connector:0001' on surface 'database_cloud_connector' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: public_internet egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a data_store endpoint, presenting a client_certificate_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by pinned_ca_handle.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:registry_read:0001' on surface 'registry_read' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: mirror_only egress over the mirror_first route (mirror_route proxy tier) to a artifact_registry endpoint, presenting a anonymous credential handle, with host proof anchored by mirror_root_handle.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:companion_handoff:0001' on surface 'companion_handoff' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: loopback_only egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a peer_device endpoint, presenting a session_cookie_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by no_tls_loopback.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:provider_mutation:0001' on surface 'provider_mutation' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: managed_endpoint egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a vcs_host endpoint, presenting a oauth_delegated_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by managed_trust_bundle.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:sync_offboarding:0001' on surface 'sync_offboarding' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: managed_endpoint egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a sync_service endpoint, presenting a bearer_token_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by managed_trust_bundle.

Action 'remote:transport_decision:remote_preview_route:0001' on surface 'remote_preview_route' resolved through the shared transport-governance layer: managed_endpoint egress over the direct route (direct_no_proxy proxy tier) to a preview_origin endpoint, presenting a bearer_token_handle credential handle, with host proof anchored by managed_trust_bundle.
